title: selliguea lanceolata
intro: Selliguea lanceolata, also known as Polypodium lanceolatum or Tawa, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selliguea lanceolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin problems.
